channel.title: Dotnet on TLDRBins
channel.description: Recent content in Dotnet on TLDRBins

item.title: dotnet
item.description: dotnet Compile c# project from Linux Download dotnet # Check if dotnet installed dotnet --info mkdir new_project cd new_project dot new console # Add dependencies if needed dotnet add package System.XXXX.XXXX.XXXX --version 1.0.0 # Add code to Program.cs # Run dotnet run
